TestCase z6Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Set a random element to 0.0 if it is greater than 0.0
    int random_index = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (follow_case.a[random_index] > 0.0) {
        follow_case.a[random_index] = 0.0;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
